TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv_Hwang_Kyo-ahn, title = Hwang_Kyo-ahn, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Seediq]}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/wiki/Hwang_Kyo-ahn} }

S.FORM: Hwang Kyo-ahn, mntucing hngkawas 1957 idas 4 jiyax 15 ka Hwang Kyo-ahn ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Korea, south ta sayang o kiya ka Hwang Kyo-ahn, pnaah hngkawas 2016 idas 12 jiyax 9 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. = Wen Cayin = Kndusan Wen Cayin pa mntuting kngkawas 1953 idas 1 diyax 24, mntuting Tuhunac Hangkoku Koje Cyun (Cingsang Nantaw Koje Su). Snpeyyah mqrinuc ka tnsapah niya. Risaw cida, mpdudul mpuyas sapah pyasan ka Wen Cayin, mqpah Ryus, bsiyaq balay tumal qmlahang Jncweyn Undo, ini prading muda qmpah seyji han pa mnsupu qmpah Ru Wusweyn, kiya ka taxa niqan balay hnhangan niya Jncweyn Ryus, kiya mi wada mangal Soto ka Ru Wusweyn daw, Wen Cayin u msupu snul mtmay Cingwatay, ngalan Misuscang. Kngkawas 2012 idas 4 diyax 11 cida, Wen Cayin pa wada mangal Fusan Sasangcyu tu19 Tahan Minkoku Kwohuy Giying. Mntna kngkawas idas 9 diyax 16, Wen Cayin u wada phyuwan hangan Mincu Tang, tumal kngkawas 2012 Soto Seyngkyo, hiti balay daw wada ini baka 108 knbkiyan hyo Burah Qnlangan Tang hosweynjn Pu Cinhuy Kngkawas 2015 dhuq kngkawas 2016 iyax niya cida, ngalan Kongtong Mincu Tang Dayhyo. Kngkawas 2017 dungan u phyuwan pusa hangan Kongtong Mincu Tang Dungan, kiya mi mniq wada mbiyax mangal kcka Kngkawas 2017 Soto Seyngkyo, tnpusu Cingwatay, Kwanghwamn seyhu knbeyhing sapah wada psaun wawi hmtur puniq daw, musa mniq burah sapah nniqan Soto, saya u ida nanaq mniq kcka Cingwatay ini thdil nina. Kngkawas 2017 das 7 diyax 24, Wen Cayin u tumal Pingcang Cyun Arpeysiya Tucya Kaygi Congsin muda Pingcang Misan Olympic Undokay kining uuda msbukuy 200 diyax, wada sdurun ngalan Seyngding Tas Pingcang Misan Olympic Undokay. Kngkawas 2018 idas 4 diyax 27, Wen Cayin u tuhuy 27, Wen Cayin u tuhuy Coseyng Kwowu Yingkay Weyweyncang Cin Cngen mniq Tahan Minkoku siyaw na Panmntyeyn Msblayaq Sapah muda Tuhunac Tudaya Hangkoku Dudux Baraw Kay. Kngkawas 2019 idas 3 diyax 13, Wen Cayin u musa homung Malaysia, mniq Putrajaya Sosyangsu tuhuy Malaysia Sosyang Tun Dr. Mahathir binMohamad mtqita dqras, tumal pnspuwan dha cicehuy, niyi ka Wen Cayin ngalan Soto Tuhunac Hangkoku daw mwaya balay mquri Malaysia muda homung, Tun Dr. Mahathir bin Mohamad pa tndahu Tuhunac Hangkoku Rulu Kongyey u knmalu balay, smatang ddha qnlhangan dha u musa msupu qmpah qpahun knou hari uuda kluwanan niya. Mntna kngkawas idas 11 diyax 28, Wen Cayin pa mniq Cingwatay tuhuy Tun Dr. Mahathir bin Mohamad muda pprngaw kari mi msupu mkan uqun cka hidaw, ddha dha u mniq pprngawan dha kari cida u quri so ddha qnlhangan mndungus bay cyeyncyaw 60 kngkawas na kawas, spkala dha ka pnluban Hankoku mi Malaysia u musa psupu quri mccbu u niqan pnspuwan qnita dha. Kngkawas 2021 idas 2 diyax 4 cida, Wen Cayin u tuhuy Amirika Soto Joe Biden pprngaw qnawal, niyi ka Jon Biden snpeyyah kngkawas 2021 idas 1 diyax 20 psdhuwan phiyu Soto dhuq cida, sediq mpdudul qnlhangan Hangkoku mi Amirika mwaya bay pprngaw pprngaw qnawal.
S.PHON: ńßwaŇč kjo-ańßn, mntu ¶iŇč ńßŇčkawas **** idas * …üijax ** ka ńßwaŇč kjo-ańßn ga, …ômpklaw ka ńßija. bukuŇč klwaan ko…ĺ…ôa, soutńß ta sajaŇč o kija ka ńßwaŇč kjo-ańßn, pnaańß ńßŇčkawas **** idas ** …üijax * pn…ĺa…üiŇč kmlawa klwaan. = w…ôn ¶ajin = kndusan w…ôn ¶ajin pa mntutiŇč kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax **, mntutiŇč tuńßuna ¶ ńßaŇčkoku ko…ü…ô ¶jun ( ¶iŇčsaŇč nantaw ko…ü…ô su). snp…ôjańß mq…ĺinu ¶ ka tnsapańß nija. …ĺisaw ¶ida, mpdudul mpujas sapańß pjasan ka w…ôn ¶ajin, mqpańß …ĺjus, bsijaq balaj tumal qmlańßaŇč …ün ¶w…ôn undo, ini p…ĺadiŇč muda qmpańß s…ô…üi ńßan pa mnsupu qmpańß …ĺu wusw…ôn, kija ka taxa niqan balaj ńßnńßaŇčan nija …ün ¶w…ôn …ĺjus, kija mi wada maŇčal soto ka …ĺu wusw…ôn daw, w…ôn ¶ajin u msupu snul mtmaj ¶iŇčwataj, Ňčalan misus ¶aŇč. kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax ** ¶ida, w…ôn ¶ajin pa wada maŇčal *usan sasaŇč ¶ju tu** tańßan minkoku kwońßuj gijiŇč. mntna kŇčkawas idas * dijax **, w…ôn ¶ajin u wada pńßjuwan ńßaŇčan min ¶u taŇč, tumal kŇčkawas **** soto s…ôŇčkjo, ńßiti balaj daw wada ini baka *** knbkijan ńßjo bu…ĺańß qnlaŇčan taŇč ńßosw…ôn…ün pu ¶inńßuj kŇčkawas **** dńßuq kŇčkawas **** ijax nija ¶ida, Ňčalan koŇčtoŇč min ¶u taŇč dajńßjo. kŇčkawas **** duŇčan u pńßjuwan pusa ńßaŇčan koŇčtoŇč min ¶u taŇč duŇčan, kija mi mniq wada mbijax maŇčal k ¶ka kŇčkawas **** soto s…ôŇčkjo, tnpusu ¶iŇčwataj, kwaŇčńßwamn s…ôńßu knb…ôńßiŇč sapańß wada psaun wawi ńßmtu…ĺ puniq daw, musa mniq bu…ĺańß sapańß nniqan soto, saja u ida nanaq mniq k ¶ka ¶iŇčwataj ini tńßdil nina. kŇčkawas **** das * dijax **, w…ôn ¶ajin u tumal piŇč ¶aŇč ¶jun a…ĺp…ôsija tu ¶ja kajgi ¶oŇčsin muda piŇč ¶aŇč misan oljmpi ¶ undokaj kiniŇč uuda msbukuj *** dijax, wada sdu…ĺun Ňčalan s…ôŇčdiŇč tas piŇč ¶aŇč misan oljmpi ¶ undokaj. kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax **, w…ôn ¶ajin u tuńßuj **, w…ôn ¶ajin u tuńßuj ¶os…ôŇč kwowu jiŇčkaj w…ôw…ôn ¶aŇč ¶in ¶Ňč…ôn mniq tańßan minkoku sijaw na panmntj…ôn msblajaq sapańß muda tuńßuna ¶ tudaja ńßaŇčkoku dudux ba…ĺaw kaj. kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax **, w…ôn ¶ajin u musa ńßomuŇč malajsia, mniq put…ĺa…üaja sosjaŇčsu tuńßuj malajsia sosjaŇč tun d…ĺ. mańßatńßi…ĺ binmońßamad mtqita dq…ĺas, tumal pnspuwan dńßa ¶i ¶…ôńßuj, niji ka w…ôn ¶ajin Ňčalan soto tuńßuna ¶ ńßaŇčkoku daw mwaja balaj mqu…ĺi malajsia muda ńßomuŇč, tun d…ĺ. mańßatńßi…ĺ bin mońßamad pa tndańßu tuńßuna ¶ ńßaŇčkoku …ĺulu koŇčj…ô u knmalu balaj, smataŇč ddńßa qnlńßaŇčan dńßa u musa msupu qmpańß qpańßun knou ńßa…ĺi uuda kluwanan nija. mntna kŇčkawas idas ** dijax **, w…ôn ¶ajin pa mniq ¶iŇčwataj tuńßuj tun d…ĺ. mańßatńßi…ĺ bin mońßamad muda pp…ĺŇčaw ka…ĺi mi msupu mkan uqun ¶ka ńßidaw, ddńßa dńßa u mniq pp…ĺŇčawan dńßa ka…ĺi ¶ida u qu…ĺi so ddńßa qnlńßaŇčan mnduŇčus baj ¶j…ôn ¶jaw ** kŇčkawas na kawas, spkala dńßa ka pnluban ńßankoku mi malajsia u musa psupu qu…ĺi m ¶ ¶bu u niqan pnspuwan qnita dńßa. kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax * ¶ida, w…ôn ¶ajin u tuńßuj ami…ĺika soto …üo…ô bid…ôn pp…ĺŇčaw qnawal, niji ka …üon bid…ôn snp…ôjańß kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax ** psdńßuwan pńßiju soto dńßuq ¶ida, s…ôdiq mpdudul qnlńßaŇčan ńßaŇčkoku mi ami…ĺika mwaja baj pp…ĺŇčaw pp…ĺŇčaw qnawal.
S.FORM: Hwang Kyo-ahn, mntucing hngkawas 1957 idas 4 jiyax 15 ka Hwang Kyo-ahn ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Korea, south ta sayang o kiya ka Hwang Kyo-ahn, pnaah hngkawas 2016 idas 12 jiyax 9 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. = Wen Cayin = Kndusan Wen Cayin pa mntuting kngkawas 1953 idas 1 diyax 24, mntuting Tuhunac Hangkoku Koje Cyun (Cingsang Nantaw Koje Su). Snpeyyah mqrinuc ka tnsapah niya. Risaw cida, mpdudul mpuyas sapah pyasan ka Wen Cayin, mqpah Ryus, bsiyaq balay tumal qmlahang Jncweyn Undo, ini prading muda qmpah seyji han pa mnsupu qmpah Ru Wusweyn, kiya ka taxa niqan balay hnhangan niya Jncweyn Ryus, kiya mi wada mangal Soto ka Ru Wusweyn daw, Wen Cayin u msupu snul mtmay Cingwatay, ngalan Misuscang. Kngkawas 2012 idas 4 diyax 11 cida, Wen Cayin pa wada mangal Fusan Sasangcyu tu19 Tahan Minkoku Kwohuy Giying. Mntna kngkawas idas 9 diyax 16, Wen Cayin u wada phyuwan hangan Mincu Tang, tumal kngkawas 2012 Soto Seyngkyo, hiti balay daw wada ini baka 108 knbkiyan hyo Burah Qnlangan Tang hosweynjn Pu Cinhuy Kngkawas 2015 dhuq kngkawas 2016 iyax niya cida, ngalan Kongtong Mincu Tang Dayhyo. Kngkawas 2017 dungan u phyuwan pusa hangan Kongtong Mincu Tang Dungan, kiya mi mniq wada mbiyax mangal kcka Kngkawas 2017 Soto Seyngkyo, tnpusu Cingwatay, Kwanghwamn seyhu knbeyhing sapah wada psaun wawi hmtur puniq daw, musa mniq burah sapah nniqan Soto, saya u ida nanaq mniq kcka Cingwatay ini thdil nina. Kngkawas 2017 das 7 diyax 24, Wen Cayin u tumal Pingcang Cyun Arpeysiya Tucya Kaygi Congsin muda Pingcang Misan Olympic Undokay kining uuda msbukuy 200 diyax, wada sdurun ngalan Seyngding Tas Pingcang Misan Olympic Undokay. Kngkawas 2018 idas 4 diyax 27, Wen Cayin u tuhuy 27, Wen Cayin u tuhuy Coseyng Kwowu Yingkay Weyweyncang Cin Cngen mniq Tahan Minkoku siyaw na Panmntyeyn Msblayaq Sapah muda Tuhunac Tudaya Hangkoku Dudux Baraw Kay. Kngkawas 2019 idas 3 diyax 13, Wen Cayin u musa homung Malaysia, mniq Putrajaya Sosyangsu tuhuy Malaysia Sosyang Tun Dr. Mahathir binMohamad mtqita dqras, tumal pnspuwan dha cicehuy, niyi ka Wen Cayin ngalan Soto Tuhunac Hangkoku daw mwaya balay mquri Malaysia muda homung, Tun Dr. Mahathir bin Mohamad pa tndahu Tuhunac Hangkoku Rulu Kongyey u knmalu balay, smatang ddha qnlhangan dha u musa msupu qmpah qpahun knou hari uuda kluwanan niya. Mntna kngkawas idas 11 diyax 28, Wen Cayin pa mniq Cingwatay tuhuy Tun Dr. Mahathir bin Mohamad muda pprngaw kari mi msupu mkan uqun cka hidaw, ddha dha u mniq pprngawan dha kari cida u quri so ddha qnlhangan mndungus bay cyeyncyaw 60 kngkawas na kawas, spkala dha ka pnluban Hankoku mi Malaysia u musa psupu quri mccbu u niqan pnspuwan qnita dha. Kngkawas 2021 idas 2 diyax 4 cida, Wen Cayin u tuhuy Amirika Soto Joe Biden pprngaw qnawal, niyi ka Jon Biden snpeyyah kngkawas 2021 idas 1 diyax 20 psdhuwan phiyu Soto dhuq cida, sediq mpdudul qnlhangan Hangkoku mi Amirika mwaya bay pprngaw pprngaw qnawal.

wawi ńßmtu…ĺ puniq daw, musa mniq bu…ĺańß sapańß nniqan soto, saja u ida nanaq mniq k ¶ka ¶iŇčwataj ini tńßdil nina. kŇčkawas **** das * dijax **, w…ôn ¶ajin u tumal piŇč ¶aŇč ¶jun a…ĺp…ôsija tu ¶ja kajgi ¶oŇčsin muda piŇč ¶aŇč misan oljmpi ¶ undokaj kiniŇč uuda msbukuj *** dijax, wada sdu…ĺun Ňčalan s…ôŇčdiŇč tas piŇč ¶aŇč misan oljmpi ¶ undokaj. kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax **, w…ôn ¶ajin u tuńßuj **, w…ôn ¶ajin u tuńßuj ¶os…ôŇč kwowu jiŇčkaj w…ôw…ôn ¶aŇč ¶in ¶Ňč…ôn mniq tańßan minkoku sijaw na panmntj…ôn msblajaq sapańß muda tuńßuna ¶ tudaja ńßaŇčkoku dudux ba…ĺaw kaj. kŇčkawas **** qnlńßaŇčan dńßa u musa msupu qmpańß qpańßun knou ńßa…ĺi uuda kluwanan nija. mntna kŇčkawas idas ** dijax **, w…ôn ¶ajin pa mniq ¶iŇčwataj tuńßuj tun d…ĺ. mańßatńßi…ĺ bin mońßamad muda pp…ĺŇčaw ka…ĺi dijax ** psdńßuwan pńßiju soto dńßuq ¶ida, s…ôdiq mpdudul qnlńßaŇčan ńßaŇčkoku mi ami…ĺika mwaja baj pp…ĺŇčaw pp…ĺŇčaw qnawal.
